## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX teams to discuss SEO strategy, competitor research, and content creation for AI roleplay platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GA4 events added to track sign-ups and demo bookings, to be integrated into Looker reports](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Competitor research and battle card creation for AI roleplay platforms prioritized for next week](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Content strategy focuses on both AI-aware and AI-curious audiences, with emphasis on LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [ChatGPT's search behavior provides insights for keyword targeting and content optimization](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)

## Topics

### GA4 Event Tracking and Looker Integration

  - [New GA4 events added to track sign-ups (individual/organization) and demo bookings](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Garrett to integrate these events into existing Looker reports for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Will provide deeper insights beyond traffic metrics, enabling sorting by signups/demo conversions](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO Focus

  - [Two target audiences: AI-aware (understand roleplay) and AI-curious (exploring implementation)](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [Emphasis on LLM visibility over traditional SEO, treating it as a "PR campaign" for ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Current high-performing content includes handling objections (e.g., "your price is too high")](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Exploring ChatGPT's search behavior for keyword insights (e.g., "sales training AI agent 2025 best practices")](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)

### Competitor Research and Differentiation

  - [Garrett to conduct competitor research on AI roleplay platforms (e.g., Hyperbound, Second Nature)](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
  - [Focus on testing platforms, reviewing G2 reviews, and analyzing demo videos](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
  - [Goal: Create internal resource on key differentiators and competitive advantages](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
  - [Plan to develop "alternative" blog posts, starting with category overview then specific competitors](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)

### Product Page Optimization

  - [Identified need for dedicated AI roleplay product/marketing page](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Current content may not be effectively surfacing Exec in AI roleplay platform searches](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
  - [Team to accelerate creation of specific, long-tail product pages](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

### Content Refinement and Keyword Targeting

  - [Revising Exec's description in comparison articles (e.g., changing "rapid AI platform creation" to "best AI roleplay platform overall")](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Considering breaking out industry-specific comparisons (e.g., sales, customer service) to better target searches](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
  - [Reviewing backlinking strategy, potentially expanding anchor text beyond "AI roleplay"](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2005.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Garrett to conduct competitor research and create bullet points on differentiators](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2045.0)
  - [Elvis to share Looker access and review backlinking strategy](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2038.0)
  - [Team to accelerate creation of specific product pages for AI roleplay](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Revise content to better target key search terms identified through ChatGPT analysis](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [Sean to review and refine the Exec section in the sample article, focusing on accurate representation of capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/g77kPDGKUrbaPKzpfYbUeGzzuNk2kmUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
